mdRecord.dcterms:title: William M. Meredith to Gertrude G. Biddle, September 23, 1865
mdRecord.dcterms:description: William M. Meredith to Gertrude G. Biddle from Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, discussing a letter from James C. Biddle, the weather, and news of acquaintances.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Civil War
United States--History--Civil War, 1861-2119
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Meredith, William M.
